title: MFMET A3.2.7 Documented example of surface roughness measurements
author: Pecnik, Christina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
materials: LNE , IMTAG, IPQ, CEA, INESC MN

steps.title: This report addresses the activity A3
steps.instruction: This report addresses the activity A3.2.7 defined in the JRP protocol as: Activity number Activity description Partners (Lead in bold) A3.2.7 M20 LNE, IMTAG, IPQ, CEA and INESC MN will perform a documented example of the test protocol developed in A3.2.

steps.title: LNE with support from IMTAG, IPQ,...
steps.instruction: LNE with support from IMTAG, IPQ, CEA and INESC MN will write a technical report on the documented example of the test protocol for surface roughness. The report will be shared with the relevant standardisation group such as ISO/TC48/WG3 and WG5, ISO/TC229, CEN/TC332/WG7. This information will also be used for manufacturing the transfer standards in A2.4.
